title: Issue #30 Plan: M2 End-to-End Validation and Live QA

issue.title: M2.10 Add M2 end-to-end validation and live QA

summary.goal: Harden M2 end-to-end readiness and live Boomi QA for the first database_to_api_sync vertical slice.
summary.approach: Add focused local tests and a live QA runbook proving the full M2 path from archetype parameters through build_from_archetype, transformation review, build_integration plan, dry-run/mocked apply, and verify-ready evidence.
summary.execution_boundary: This issue validates the shipped M2 create/apply/verify path. It must not implement M3 deploy/test orchestration, schedule activation, runtime execution, execution-log polling, or verified Try/Catch retry/DLQ XML.
non_goals: Do not add new MCP tools or public schemas.
Do not change database, REST, profile, map, script, or process XML builders unless an end-to-end test exposes a blocking M2 defect.
Do not un-gate retry_count or DLQ process emission; that remains issue #51.
Do not deploy packages, attach runtimes, enable schedules, execute processes, fetch runtime logs, or automate failure-row runtime proof; those remain M3.
Do not commit account-specific raw XML, secrets, payloads, SQL, mappings, or Boomi execution data.
Do not mutate the work Boomi profile during live QA.

current_state.issue_29_status: Closed. database_to_api_sync emits an executable IntegrationSpecV1 suitable for build_integration(action='plan').
implemented_path: build_from_archetype_action validates database_to_api_sync parameters and emits JSON-only IntegrationSpecV1.
The archetype composes the #27 source/transform primitives and #28 target/operational primitives.
build_integration(action='plan') validates deterministic dependency order and builder-routed component configs.
Inline map_script routes are materialized as script.mapping components and the planner synthesizes the required transform.function wrapper.
review_transformation can inspect both contract flow metadata and executable profile/map components.
known_boundaries: Process retry/DLQ stays gated: emitted process reliability remains retry_count=0 and dlq.mode='disabled'. Requested retry/DLQ intent is recorded in validation_rules.operational_intent and deferred to #51.
Schedule and watermark intent are planning metadata only in M2; actual schedule activation and dynamic operation-property wiring are deferred to M3/#51.
Live Boomi create/apply can create components, but deploy/run/log/failure-row runtime proof is manual or deferred until M3 orchestration.

boomi_docs_facts_used.source: Boomi docs search: Automating deployments with packaged components
facts: Automated deployment requires target environments, runtimes attached to environments, deployment privileges, and component IDs for deployable components.
The documented workflow packages a component version, deploys the package to an environment, then configures environment extensions and schedules.
boomi_docs_facts_used.impact: Issue #30 should not treat deploy/run/schedule activation as part of M2 local validation.

boomi_docs_facts_used.source: Boomi docs search: Process and document log viewing
facts: Execution events are logged at process and document levels.
Logs are stored locally with the runtime, so the runtime must be online for log viewing.
boomi_docs_facts_used.impact: Issue #30 can document runtime-log QA evidence expectations, but automated log retrieval belongs to M3 orchestration.

live_reference_candidates.name: MS SQL Server Orders DB
live_reference_candidates.usage: Candidate database connection for reuse-mode live QA.

live_reference_candidates.name: REST None
live_reference_candidates.usage: Candidate no-auth REST Client connection for reuse-mode live QA.

current_state.known_test_infra_risk: The full suite may still fail in tests/test_verified_storage.py if earlier async tests clear the current event loop and that file keeps using asyncio.get_event_loop().run_until_complete(coro). If this remains true during #30, fix that helper as test infrastructure required for the full-suite acceptance gate.

validated_existing_tools.purpose: Pre-apply transformation inspection for source fields, target fields, unmapped validation, and generated test payloads.
Plan, dry-run apply, real apply when explicitly approved, and verify created/reused components.

new_docs.purpose: Tracked live QA runbook and evidence template for M2 database_to_api_sync validation.

public_interfaces.gitignore: If docs/* ignore rules hide the new live QA runbook, add a selective allow rule for docs/M2_DATABASE_TO_API_SYNC_LIVE_QA.md. Keep docs/plans local/ignored unless the project policy changes.

changes: Add a dedicated local E2E test module, for example tests/patterns/test_database_to_api_sync_e2e.py.
Use reusable payload builders for minimal create-mode DB + create-mode REST none-auth sync, reuse-mode scheduled/incremental sync, inline map_script sync, and invalid/unresolvable plans.

Keep test data synthetic with sentinel placeholders only; do not use real SQL, real API payloads, real credentials, or live account IDs in local fixtures except documented reusable component IDs in the live QA runbook.
Call build_from_archetype_action('database_to_api_sync', parameters) and assert _success true, raw_xml_exposed false, boomi_mutation false, deterministic component keys, and JSON serializability.
Call review_transformation_action('validate_unmapped', {'integration_spec': spec}) and assert the valid E2E payload is transformation-review clean before planning.
Call build_integration_action(mock_boomi, profile, 'plan', {'integration_spec': spec, 'conflict_policy': 'reuse'}) with paginate_metadata mocked and assert _success true.
Assert every emitted component appears exactly once in execution_order, every dependency precedes its dependent, and main_process is last.
Assert the plan exposes the transform_summary and review_hint for the transform.map step.
Assert operational intent is present for schedule, watermark, retry request, DLQ request, error_classifier, expected_status_codes, and run_metadata.
Assert actual process reliability remains gated: retry_count=0 and dlq.mode='disabled', with deferred metadata pointing to #51 or M3 as appropriate.
Test build_integration_action(..., 'apply', config without dry_run=false) returns dry_run true, includes the plan, and does not call _execute_component.
Test mocked apply with dry_run=false by patching _execute_component to return deterministic component IDs for created components.

Assert $ref tokens are resolved before the main_process config reaches _execute_component, including source connection/operation, transform map, target connection/operation, and script wrapper dependencies when using map_script.

For reuse-mode DB and REST connections, mock existing component resolution and assert apply records status='reused', carries the existing component IDs into the registry, and does not call _execute_component for reference_only components.
Test a fail-fast path where planning returns error_missing_target or validation error, then assert apply returns _success false and _execute_component is never called.
Exercise server.build_from_archetype through the wrapper path for database_to_api_sync, mirroring the existing wrapper test style.
Exercise build_integration through the server wrapper by monkeypatching get_current_user, get_secret, and Boomi so no real credentials or network calls are used.
Confirm config must be a JSON string at the MCP wrapper boundary and malformed JSON / non-object JSON returns _success false with actionable error text.
Do not add live-account dependencies to wrapper tests.
Add docs/M2_DATABASE_TO_API_SYNC_LIVE_QA.md with a step-by-step manual QA workflow.
Default live QA profile is reneraai-5RO3DD; work profile is read-only reference only.

Use reuse-mode connections by default: DB component 107aaef1-cb1e-4975-be44-69d120803864 and REST component 7f7e0730-1152-4467-b912-e3a8ed12782a, after confirming they still exist with query_components.
Use a unique integration/component prefix such as M2QA-<UTC timestamp> and conflict_policy='fail' to avoid accidentally reusing or overwriting previous QA output.

Document the exact sequence: query reference components, build_from_archetype, review_transformation validate_unmapped, build_integration plan, build_integration apply dry_run=true, optional explicitly approved build_integration apply dry_run=false, and build_integration verify using the returned build_id.
Include an evidence template capturing profile, timestamp, build_id, execution_order, created/reused component IDs, component names, warnings, validation errors, and blocked prerequisites.

State that package deploy, runtime attachment, schedule enablement, process execution, execution logs, and failure-row proof are deferred to M3 unless the QA operator performs them manually and records evidence separately.
Update docs/INTEGRATION_AUTHORING_ROADMAP.md under M2 with an M2.10 / Issue #30 note after tests and runbook are added.
Clarify that M2 validation covers local end-to-end assembly plus Boomi component create/apply/verify readiness.
Clarify that deploy/test orchestration, schedule activation, runtime execution, execution logs, and failure-row runtime proof remain M3/#51 scope.

If full pytest still fails only because tests/test_verified_storage.py uses asyncio.get_event_loop() after async wrapper tests cleared the current loop, replace that helper with a private event loop pattern equivalent to the existing wrapper-test _run_async helper.
Do not make unrelated behavior changes in verified storage; this is only to unblock the full regression acceptance gate for #30.

expected_local_assertions: Full local M2 path passes without live Boomi access.
Mocked real apply resolves $ref dependencies before process execution.
reference_only reuse components are recorded as reused and do not invoke component creation.
Requested retry/DLQ/schedule/watermark behavior is visible as intent but not emitted as unsupported process XML.
Malformed wrapper config returns structured failure.
No tests echo secret-shaped values, credential refs in failures, raw XML, real SQL, or real payloads.
live_qa_validation: Run the new runbook against reneraai-5RO3DD.
Confirm reference DB and REST components still exist before building.
Record build_from_archetype, review_transformation, plan, dry-run apply, optional explicit apply, and verify outputs.
Post evidence to issue #30 or project notes: profile, timestamp, build_id, created/reused component IDs, execution order, and any blocked external prerequisites.
If live mutation is not approved or prerequisites are unavailable, record the block explicitly rather than marking live QA complete.

assumptions: Issue #29 is the starting baseline and remains clean.
Live mutation, if performed, is allowed only in the Renera test profile and only after explicit operator approval.
The work profile may be used for read-only reference only.
Live QA uses existing connector references to avoid handling plaintext secrets.
M2 does not implement deploy/test orchestration; M3 owns package deployment, runtime attachment, schedule activation, execution, polling, and log retrieval.
Issue #51 owns verified Try/Catch wrapper XML, retry_count un-gating, DLQ catch-path wiring, and related golden process-flow XML tests.
If #30 E2E tests reveal a blocker in the shipped M2 path, fix that blocker in #30; otherwise file follow-up issues for broader behavior gaps.
docs/plans remains local/ignored according to current repository policy unless the user explicitly asks to track plan files.
